# Christopher Mendez — AI Automation & Workflow Consultant

> International AI Automation Consultant, Workflow Builder, and Business Process Automation expert. Helps small businesses, agencies, coaches, consultants, and service businesses worldwide automate operations using Make.com, Zapier, n8n, OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini. Based in Davao City, Philippines — serving US, EU, UK, AU, and CA clients remotely.

## What He Does

- **AI Automation Consulting** — designing and building AI agents that read context, decide, and act (OpenAI GPT-4o, Anthropic Claude 3.5, Google Gemini, function calling).
- **Workflow Automation** — Make.com, Zapier, n8n pipelines that remove repetitive admin work, sync data across tools, and run 24/7.
- **Business Process Automation (BPA)** — end-to-end operational systems for lead capture, qualification, onboarding, fulfillment, billing, and reporting.
- **CRM Automation** — Salesforce, GoHighLevel, HubSpot, Mailchimp, Flodesk — pipeline automation, lead routing, lifecycle sequences.
- **Lead Generation Systems** — multi-source prospecting (Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, inbound forms) with AI scoring and CRM sync.
- **AI Integration** — connecting ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and custom LLM workflows into existing business tools.
- **Operations & Virtual Assistance** — AI-augmented inbox, calendar, research, documentation, and reporting workflows.
- **Technical Support & Systems** — Active Directory, Hyper-V, VMware, Windows Server, AWS, GCP.

## Who He Works With

- Small and growing businesses (US, EU, UK, AU, CA)
- Agencies (marketing, recruiting, real estate, creative)
- Coaches, consultants, online educators
- Local service businesses (cleaning, salons, contractors)
- Startups & founders drowning in manual ops
- Recruiters running high-volume outbound

- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Selected automation projects across categories.

- [Blog](/blog): AI automation, workflow design, operations, productivity articles.
- [AI Assistant](/ai-assistant): Chat with Chris AI — explains automation and recommends services.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a free Discovery Call (Calendly) or send an inquiry. Includes FAQ.

## Engagement

- Free 30-min Discovery Call: https://calendly.com/va-chrismendez/30min
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mendez-christopher/
- Tiers: Starter (1–2 weeks) · Professional (3–6 weeks) · Enterprise (scoped)
- Works async by default; synchronous calls in client business hours.
